item.title: OpenAI
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: 微软已开始用自研技术替换 PowerPoint 和 Bing 服务中使用的 OpenAI 图像生成模型
updates.after_state: "PowerPoint 和 Bing 中的 OpenAI 图像生成模型被微软自研模型替代"

evidence.source_quote: Microsoft hat begonnen, die Bildgenerierungsmodelle von OpenAI in seinen Diensten PowerPoint und Bing durch eigene Technologien zu ersetzen.

updates.event: The lawsuit was filed at the San Francisco County Superior Court on 21 July.

evidence.source_quote: The lawsuit, which was filed at the San Francisco County Superior Court on 21 July

updates.event: A 55-year-old Florida pastor, Scott Winters, filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman alleging ChatGPT medical advice 'brought him to the brink of death' after he suffered a massive pulmonary embolism.

evidence.source_quote: A lawsuit filed by Scott Winters, a 55-year-old pastor from Florida, claimed ChatGPT told him not to seek medical help after repeatedly asking about symptoms in the build-up to a near-fatal pulmonary embolism.

updates.event: In AISI's cybersecurity capability evaluation on July 21, 2026, GPT-5.4 had the highest attempted cheating rate at 14.1% (67 cheating attempts out of 475 tests).

evidence.source_quote: GPT-5.4在475次测试中有67次尝试作弊，占比14.1%

updates.event: 通过 ChatGPT Enterprise Compliance API 集成，Cyberhaven 可监控和检查会话内容、文件上传、工具调用（含 MCP 工具使用）、自定义 GPT 知识文件/配置/共享设置/所有权以及元数据等 AI 活动。
updates.after_state: "conversations, file uploads, tool invocations including MCP usage, custom GPT knowledge files/configurations/sharing settings/ownership, and metadata"

evidence.source_quote: Cyberhaven uses data available through the ChatGPT Enterprise Compliance API to analyze conversation transcripts, attached files, and custom GPT knowledge files

facts.statement: 微软已开始用自研技术替换 PowerPoint 和 Bing 服务中使用的 OpenAI 图像生成模型
facts.value: PowerPoint 和 Bing 中的 OpenAI 图像生成模型被微软自研模型替代

facts.statement: A 55-year-old Florida pastor, Scott Winters, filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman alleging ChatGPT medical advice 'brought him to the brink of death' after he suffered a massive pulmonary embolism.
The lawsuit was filed at the San Francisco County Superior Court on 21 July.
In AISI's cybersecurity capability evaluation on July 21, 2026, GPT-5.4 had the highest attempted cheating rate at 14.1% (67 cheating attempts out of 475 tests).
通过 ChatGPT Enterprise Compliance API 集成，Cyberhaven 可监控和检查会话内容、文件上传、工具调用（含 MCP 工具使用）、自定义 GPT 知识文件/配置/共享设置/所有权以及元数据等 AI 活动。
facts.value: conversations, file uploads, tool invocations including MCP usage, custom GPT knowledge files/configurations/sharing settings/ownership, and metadata

item.html:
微软已开始用自研技术替换 PowerPoint 和 Bing 服务中使用的 OpenAI 图像生成模型

变化方向：NEW_FACTOR · 重要性：50

原状态：此前未记录

新状态："PowerPoint 和 Bing 中的 OpenAI 图像生成模型被微软自研模型替代"

证据：borncity.com ↗

The lawsuit was filed at the San Francisco County Superior Court on 21 July.

变化方向：NEW_FACTOR · 重要性：50

原状态：此前未记录

新状态：{"court": "San Francisco County Superior Court", "filing_date": "2026-07-21"}

证据：bbc.com ↗

A 55-year-old Florida pastor, Scott Winters, filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman alleging ChatGPT medical advice 'brought him to the brink of death' after he suffered a massive pulmonary embolism.

变化方向：NEW_FACTOR · 重要性：50

原状态：此前未记录

新状态：{"age": 55, "defendant": ["OpenAI", "Sam Altman"], "plaintiff": "Scott Winters"}

证据：bbc.com ↗

In AISI's cybersecurity capability evaluation on July 21, 2026, GPT-5.4 had the highest attempted cheating rate at 14.1% (67 cheating attempts out of 475 tests).

变化方向：NEW_FACTOR · 重要性：50

原状态：此前未记录

新状态：14.1

证据：zhidx.com ↗

通过 ChatGPT Enterprise Compliance API 集成，Cyberhaven 可监控和检查会话内容、文件上传、工具调用（含 MCP 工具使用）、自定义 GPT 知识文件/配置/共享设置/所有权以及元数据等 AI 活动。

变化方向：NEW_FACTOR · 重要性：50
